_meta.name: avatar render sync — v2.0_RC destination criterion #2

gate_full: 8/8 PASS required from test_avatar_sync.hexa for RC acceptance

payload_shape.viseme_timeline: [{ t_ms: int, viseme: str }] — monotonic, viseme ∈ {A,I,U,E,O,_}

contract.hangul_mapping: jungseong idx 0..20 → coarse 5-viseme (see jungseong_to_viseme in avatar_feed.hexa)

architecture.render_path: WebSocket/fetch → JSON payload → AudioContext.decodeAudioData → playBuffer + rAF viseme loop → lipSync(viseme, intensity) → CSS scaleX/scaleY on #anima-mouth
architecture.fallback: mockAudio() 500ms sine-sum buffer for dev without TTS
architecture.backend: serving/avatar_feed.hexa wraps text → build_feed(text, audio_path, duration_ms) → feed_to_json() for wire transport

hexa_quirks_hit: 0x-prefixed literals parse as 0 — UTF-8 / Hangul thresholds rewritten in decimal (128/192/224/240/44032/55203)
bytes[i] returns 1-char string, not int — wrapped in ord() to get byte value
continue is supported in while loops (confirmed)
str_to_bytes() not available in current stage1 interpreter — use ord(bytes[i]) instead
known_limits: Coarse 5-viseme set only (no diphthong resolution for ㅘ/ㅙ/ㅢ — picked majority-rounded closest)
Per-syllable pacing is even-spaced (body/(n-1)); real phoneme-level duration wire deferred to anima-speak E2E
Latin path handles 5 vowels; consonants absorb into preceding vowel hold — sufficient for 'hello' probe but not English prosody

stage0_workarounds: int-scaled x1000 to avoid multi-float struct corruption
JSON serializer divides back to float strings

next_wire_points: anima-speak E2E (criterion #1) — plug real phoneme durations into pace_timeline()
web/index.html — integrate avatar_sync.js with consciousness params overlay
anima-body/speech_gesture_sync.hexa — Kuramoto coupling between viseme rate and gesture oscillator
emotion classifier — wire real valence/activation from NLU pipeline into snapshot_new()
guardrails_respected: no edits to serving/http_server.hexa | hire_routes.hexa | style_switch.hexa (git M state)
